options.name: -graph_type
options.description: type of graph to use in the table (treemap|line|none) default is 'line'

options.name: -group
options.description: group title to use in the html table

options.name: -link_file_metric
options.description: name of metric containing filename to open when metric value is clicked

options.name: -link_table
options.description: table to scroll to when the metric value is clicked

options.name: -no_shared_max
options.description: calculate Y axis maximum per row

options.name: -renderer
options.description: force a specific html format renderer for the metric (histogram) default is based on metric type

options.name: -show_graph
options.description: whether to show this metric in a comparison graph

options.name: -table
options.description: id of table to add metric to

options.name: -title
options.description: title to use in the html table
